title: Banana Sandwich Optimized Modpack
description: Approved mods for the Banana Sandwich server, with some optimization.
body:
# 🍌 Banana Sandwich Optimized Client
Welcome to the official optimized client pack for the Banana Sandwich community!
This client-side pack is designed to deliver the smoothest, cleanest, and most stable gameplay experience possible—without altering gameplay or giving unfair advantages.

This pack is perfect for players who want better FPS, improved visuals, faster load times, and overall smoother gameplay while keeping full compatibility with the Banana Sandwich server.

## ✨ What This Pack Includes
✔️ Performance-boosting mods (FPS improvements, reduced stuttering)
✔️ UI and HUD enhancements
✔️ Visual improvements that don’t affect gameplay balance
✔️ Quality-of-life tweaks for smoother interaction
✔️ Zero “cheaty” features — fully server-friendly
✔️ All client mods personally tested and approved for Banana Sandwich use

## 🚀 Why Use This Optimized Client?
- Minecraft can be demanding, especially with newer versions. This pack helps by:
- Reducing lag spikes
- Increasing framerates
- Improving game responsiveness
- Cleaning up animations & lighting
- Shortening load times
- Enhancing visibility and clarity without modifying gameplay
- Whether you’re on a low-end laptop or a high-end PC, this pack ensures a better, cleaner, and faster experience.

## 🎮 Banana Sandwich Compatible
**This pack is 100% safe to use on the Banana Sandwich server.**
Every mod has been verified to:
- Work properly with the server
- Not provide unfair advantages
- Correctly load with the server’s version and modloader
- Enhance performance without altering gameplay mechanics

## 📥 How to Use
1. Download the .mrpack file
2. Import into the Modrinth App (or any compatible launcher)
3. Launch Minecraft
4. Enjoy a smoother client on the Banana Sandwich server!

### 💬 Credits
Pack Author: Bhored / Banana Sandwich Team
Purpose: Provide the best possible client performance experience
Version: 1.0.0 (Built for your specific MC version)
